title: Knowledge Asset Boundary
user_language_aliases: 너무 경색되지도 너무 열려 있지도 않은 기준
query_examples: 사용자가 자신의 현실을 발전시킨다는 기준은 뭐였지?
source material과 execution asset은 어떻게 다르지?
summary: The user asked to define the scope, boundary, and criteria of knowledge assets so the loop is neither too rigid nor too open and helps any user develop their reality.
observed_facts: The user requested scope, boundary, and criteria for knowledge assets.
The user said the loop should help any user develop their reality.
user_decisions: Knowledge asset promotion needs explicit boundaries before implementation.
assistant_judgments: A Knowledge Asset Charter should be a precondition for skill hardening and CLI implementation.
traps: Treating raw source material as knowledge assets.
Making criteria so strict that early-stage users cannot benefit.

knowledge_candidates.text: Asset ladder: source material -> reality signal -> knowledge candidate -> knowledge asset -> execution asset.

execution_assets.text: Add the asset ladder to future Knowledge Loop outputs.

next_actions: Use the asset ladder in the pending skill proposal and CLI output schema.
next_safe_action: Review the classified candidates before any memory, automation, connector, or release action.
